- gcc
c_compiler_version:
- '14'
c_stdlib:
- sysroot
c_stdlib_version:
- '2.17'
casadi:
- '3.7'
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
console_bridge:
- '1.0'
cxx_compiler:
- gxx
cxx_compiler_version:
- '14'

- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9

- 3.4.0

- '1.88'

- '1.88'

- '2'

  python:
    min_pin: x.x
    max_pin: x.x
python:
- 3.10.* *_cpython
qhull:
- '2020.2'
target_platform:
- linux-64
urdfdom:
- '5.1'
zip_keys:
- - c_compiler_version
  - cxx_compiler_version

raw_meta_yaml:
{% set name = "pinocchio" %}
{% set cppname = "lib" + name %}
{% set pythonname = name + "-python" %}
{% set version = "4.0.0" %}

package:
  name: {{ name|lower }}-split
  version: {{ version }}

source:
  url: https://github.com/stack-of-tasks/{{ name }}/releases/download/v{{ version }}/{{ name }}-{{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: 0cfa23e2874eb9978dd7d952f3d8df855adb14e166b1a31860ac5c28c6348fb4

build:
  number: 0
  run_exports:
    - {{ pin_subpackage(name, max_pin='x.x.x') }}

outputs:
  - name: {{ cppname }}
    build:
      run_exports:
        - {{ pin_subpackage(cppname, max_pin='x.x.x') }}
    script: build_pinocchio_cpp.sh  # [not win]
    script: build_pinocchio_cpp.bat  # [win]
    requirements:
      build:
        - {{ compiler('cxx') }}
        - {{ stdlib("c") }}
        - cmake
        - ninja
        - libgomp       # [linux]
        - llvm-openmp   # [osx]
      host:
        - eigen
        - urdfdom
        - coal
        - libboost-devel
        - casadi
        - qhull
        - qhull-static  # [not win]
        - console_bridge
        - libsdformat
        - libgz-math
        - eigen-abi-devel
      run:
        - libboost-devel
        - qhull-static  # [not win]
      test:
        requires:
          - cmake-package-check
          - {{ compiler('c') }}
          - {{ compiler('cxx') }}
        commands:
          - cmake-package-check pinocchio
          - test -f $PREFIX/lib/lib{{ name }}_default${SHLIB_EXT}  # [unix]
          - if not exist %PREFIX%\Library\bin\{{ name }}_default.dll exit 1  # [win]
  - name: {{ pythonname }}
    script: build_pinocchio_python.sh  # [not win]
    script: build_pinocchio_python.bat  # [win]
    requirements:
      build:
        - python                                 # [build_platform != target_platform]
        - cross-python_{{ target_platform }}     # [build_platform != target_platform]
        - numpy                                  # [build_platform != target_platform]
        - {{ compiler('cxx') }}
        - {{ stdlib("c") }}
        - clang  # [win]
        - cmake
        - ninja
      host:
        - eigen
        - eigenpy
        - hpp-fcl
        - libboost-devel
        - libboost-python-devel
        - python
        # On Windows, Numpy 2.0 don't allow to export the PY_ARRAY_UNIQUE_SYMBOL.
        # This has been fixed in Numpy 2.1.
        - numpy >=2.1      # [win and py>=310]
        # Unfortunatly, Numpy 2.1 is not distributed with Python 3.9.
        # We are forced to use Numpy 1 in this case.
        - numpy >=1.19,<2  # [win and py<310]
        - numpy            # [not win]
        - casadi
        - {{ pin_subpackage(cppname, exact=true) }}
        - eigen-abi-devel
      run:
        - python
        - numpy >=2.1      # [win and py>=310]
        - {{ pin_compatible('numpy') }}  # [win and py<310]
        - {{ pin_subpackage(cppname, exact=true) }}
    test:
      requires:
        - pip
      imports:
        - pinocchio
      commands:
        - python -c "import importlib.metadata as metadata; assert metadata.version('pin') == '{{ version }}'"
        - python -m pip show pin
  - name: {{ name }}
    build:
      run_exports:
        - {{ pin_subpackage(cppname, max_pin='x.x.x') }}
    requirements:
      host:
        # Explicitely add a python requirement so that the hash changes between python version
        - python
      run:
        - {{ pin_subpackage(cppname, exact=true) }}
        - {{ pin_subpackage(pythonname, exact=true) }}
    test:
      requires:
        - cmake-package-check
        - {{ compiler('c') }}
        - {{ compiler('cxx') }}
      imports:
        - pinocchio
      commands:
        - cmake-package-check pinocchio
        - test -f $PREFIX/lib/lib{{ name }}_default${SHLIB_EXT}  # [unix]
        - if not exist %PREFIX%\Library\bin\{{ name }}_default.dll exit 1  # [win]

about:
  home: http://github.com/stack-of-tasks/pinocchio
  license: BSD-2-Clause
  license_family: BSD
  license_file: LICENSE
  summary: A fast and flexible implementation of Rigid Body Dynamics algorithms and their analytical derivatives
  dev_url: https://github.com/stack-of-tasks/pinocchio

extra:
  feedstock-name: pinocchio
  recipe-maintainers:
    - ManifoldFR
    - nim65s
    - fabinsch
    - jorisv
    - jcarpent
    - wolfv
    - ymontmarin

about.summary: A fast and flexible implementation of Rigid Body Dynamics algorithms and their analytical derivatives

commands: python -c "import importlib.metadata as metadata; assert metadata.version('pin') == '4.0.0'"
python -c "import importlib.metadata as metadata; assert metadata.version('pin') == '4.0.0'"
python -c "import importlib.metadata as metadata; assert metadata.version('pin') == '4.0.0'"
python -c "import importlib.metadata as metadata; assert metadata.version('pin') == '4.0.0'"
python -c "import importlib.metadata as metadata; assert metadata.version('pin') == '4.0.0'"
